# Label taxonomy

The labels in use on this repository, and what each one means.

| Label              | For                                                                 |
| ------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `good first issue` | Well-scoped, no project context needed; majority should be non-code |
| `non-code`         | Contribution needs no programming (cards, sources, playtests, text) |
| `event-card`       | Event deck content                                                  |
| `policy-card`      | Policy deck content                                                 |
| `sources`          | The registry: dead links, better sources, figure mismatches         |
| `playtest`         | Playtest reports and findings                                       |
| `balance`          | Tuning discussions; must cite simulation batches or playtests       |
| `engine`           | Pure simulation layer; determinism rules apply                      |
| `ui`               | React layer, styling, interaction                                   |
| `a11y`             | Keyboard, screen reader, contrast, motion                           |
| `i18n`             | String infrastructure (translation waves open at Phase 4)           |
| `bug`              | Something is wrong                                                  |
| `docs`             | README, guides, rules text                                          |
| `voice`            | Displayed text that does not sound human yet                        |
| `realism`          | Disputes for the advisory board once it exists                      |
